description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rocker/verse:latest Docker image and define stages build, check, test, deploy. Include a before_script that conditionally runs .gitlab-ci/gitlab-com.R, installs the remotes package with R --vanilla -e 'install.packages("remotes", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org/")', installs the packager package via R --vanilla -e 'remotes::install_gitlab("fvafrcu/packager")', installs all dependencies with R --vanilla -e 'packager::install_deps(path = ".", repos = "http://ftp5.gwdg.de/pub/misc/cran/")', and optionally executes ./.gitlab-ci/apt-script.cl if present. In the build stage add a build_and_check job that runs R CMD build --no-manual --no-build-vignettes . . In the check stage add a packager job that runs R --vanilla -e 'packager::rcmdcheck_and_log(".", build_args = c("--no-manual","--no-build-vignettes"))'. In the test stage add a coverage job that runs R --vanilla -e 'install.packages("covr", repos = "https://cloud.r-project.org/"); covr::package_coverage()' and uses a coverage regex /^.*\s*Coverage:\s*\d+.\d+\%$/. In the deploy stage add a pages job that creates a .public directory, copies all files into it, renames it to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact, running only on the master branch.
